title: Backend: Form CRUD Endpoints with Versioning
description: Implement REST API endpoints for forms: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /admin/forms. Form includes form_sections array (section_symbol, version_number, order_number), formulas list, status, form_organisations permissions, translations. Version management: editing a published form creates a new version. Only attach published sections to published forms.

statusHistory.comment: Planning implementation of Form CRUD endpoints with versioning based on form-editor-planning-summary.md
